creator: dreamcat4@gmail.com
text:
Hi Bernhard,
Unfortunately I am no longer involved with the FreeBSD project. Had to switch over to linux because of other technical reasons / considerations.

However I have looked through this patch. Really cannot see anything amiss, or any obvious issue with it. So please go ahead with this patch. And progress it. 

(Although... it would also make sense modify the maintainer field. To change it from <my name/email> to <your name/email>. That would probably be best. Kind Regards. & Thank you for updating this package in my absence.
